G: fix(ttl_boundary_revalidate_loop)

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: limiter גˆ§ reset גˆ§ edge גˆ§ release
C: now>resetגˆ§!releasedג†’allow
H: retry-after=reset-windowגˆ§edge(-30s_200)
P: now>=resetגˆ§ֲ¬releasedג†’release_once
V: at_resetגˆ§allowגˆ§ֲ¬storm

A: add גˆ§ one-shot גˆ§ released גˆ§ flag; גˆ§ gate גˆ§ allow גˆ§ on גˆ§ now>=reset גˆ§ and גˆ§ clear גˆ§ only גˆ§ after גˆ§ first גˆ§ admit

[AUDIT]
Goal: limiter and reset and edge and release.
Constraints: now>reset and high-risk released then allow.
Hypothesis: retry-after=reset-window and edge(-30s_200).
Plan: now>=reset and ֲ¬released then release_once.
Verify: at_reset and allow and ֲ¬storm.
Risk: high-risk retry_storm.
Answer target: add and one-shot and released and flag; and gate and allow and on and now>=reset and and and clear and only and after and first and admit.

G: fix(public_ping_auth_guard)

- keep healthcheck bypass
- allow public ping without session
- preserve !session=>401 for protected routes

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(overdue_middleware_grace24h_boundary_charge_loop)

H: charge_at(t) גˆ§ overdue_since(t0) גˆ§ t-t0<=24h ג†’ allow
P: overdue_since(t0) גˆ§ t-t0<=24h גˆ§ charge_attempt(t) ג†’ no_402
V: t-t0<24h
A: reg_t

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix(overdue_middleware_grace24h_boundary_charge_loop).
Constraints: overdue implies 402 and grace24h implies allow.
Hypothesis: charge_at(t) and overdue_since(t0) and t-t0<=24h then allow.
Plan: overdue_since(t0) and t-t0<=24h and charge_attempt(t) then no_402.
Verify: t-t0<24h.
Answer target: regression test.
